featureDisabled.title: NFT Event is Currently Unavailable
featureDisabled.description: The NFT event feature is currently disabled. Please check back later.

header.title: Wave 1 Battalion NFT Free Mint
header.description: Complete the tasks below to join the allowlist and mint your NFT.

errors.missingInfo: Missing required information. Please complete all previous steps.
errors.registerFailed: Failed to register. Please try again.

step1.title: Welcome to the Wave 1 Battalion NFT Free Mint Event!
step1.description: This is your special opportunity to mint NASUN's first NFT collection for free.

rewards.title: Rewards
rewards.item1: 1 Free Wave 1 Battalion NFT Mint per Person
rewards.item2: Priority access to future airdrops and events
rewards.item4: Collect all Battalion NFTs + Genesis NFT to increase Multipliers

step2.title: Connect Your X Account
step2.description: Please connect your X account to verify your event participation.
step2.infoSimplified: This is a one-time authentication for event participation verification.
step2.privacyNote: Only your username and ID are collected and used solely for event verification
step2.authenticationPurpose: X OAuth authentication is required to verify the following event tasks:
step2.verifyLikes: Check if you liked the target tweet
step2.verifyRetweets: Check if you retweeted the target tweet
step2.notSignUp: This is verification only — not signing up to our website
step2.tokenAutoDelete: 🔒 This is a one-time authentication for event participation verification.
step2.infoTitle: Why do we need X integration?
step2.infoDescription: We need X account integration to verify event participation requirements (follow, like, retweet). We only use read permissions and will not post anything.
step2.privacyDescription: When connecting your X account, only your username and ID are collected and used solely for event participation verification.
step2.followDescription: Follow us to get early access to future events and exclusive updates!

errors.noUserInfo: Failed to get user information from Twitter

step3.title: Verify Event Tasks
step3.description: Verify that you have completed all the tasks below.
step3.fallbackDescription: Automatic verification is temporarily unavailable. Please manually verify the tasks below:

fallbackInstructions.title: Please verify the following:
fallbackInstructions.item1: Check if you have followed @Nasun_io account
fallbackInstructions.item2: Check if you have liked the event post
fallbackInstructions.item3: Check if you have retweeted the event post

step3.fallbackNote: 💡 If you have completed all tasks, try clicking "Retry" or proceed to the next step.

errors.incomplete: Some tasks are incomplete. Please complete all tasks and try again.
errors.failed: Task verification failed. Please try again later.

step4.title: Connect Wallet
step4.description: Please connect your Ethereum wallet to receive the NFT.
step4.infoDescription: Please connect your Ethereum wallet address to receive the NFT. Approve the connection when the MetaMask popup appears.
step4.networkNote: ⚠️ The network will automatically switch to the correct one when connecting your wallet
step4.installing: Please refresh this page after installing MetaMask.

errors.noMetaMask: MetaMask is not installed. Please install it and try again.

step5.title: Register for Allowlist
step5.description: All tasks completed! Please review the information below and register for the allowlist.

step6.title: 🎉 Allowlist Registration Complete!
step6.description: Congratulations! You have successfully registered for the Wave 1 Battalion NFT allowlist.
step6.shareMessage: I've registered for the Wave 1 Battalion NFT allowlist! 🎉 #NASUN #NFT

info.title: Registration Info
info.item1: You will receive an email notification when minting starts
info.item2: You can mint NFT with your registered wallet address

mintingGuide.title: OpenSea Minting Guide
mintingGuide.step1: Go to the OpenSea collection page
mintingGuide.step2: Log in to OpenSea with your registered wallet (MetaMask)
mintingGuide.step3: Click the 'Mint' button to mint your NFT
mintingGuide.step4: Confirm the gas fee and approve the transaction
mintingGuide.note: The minting start date will be announced separately

step6.tip: 💡 Tip: Bookmark the OpenSea minting page!
step6.sharePrompt: Share this event with your friends!

walletDisconnected.title: ⚠️ Wallet Disconnected
walletDisconnected.description: Your registration is saved, but your MetaMask wallet is no longer connected.
walletDisconnected.instruction: Please reconnect your wallet to view your registration details and participate in the NFT mint.
walletDisconnected.resetConfirm: Are you sure you want to reset your registration? This action cannot be undone.
walletDisconnected.helpText: If you reconnect the same wallet, your registration will be automatically restored from the backend.

step6.walletDisconnectedWarning: Your wallet is disconnected. Please reconnect to ensure you can participate in the mint.
step6.goToMyAccount: Go to My Account to Reconnect

info.title: Registration Info
info.item1: You will receive an email notification when minting starts
info.item2: You can mint NFT with your registered wallet address
info.registrationSaved: Your allowlist registration is saved in our backend
info.xAccountSaved: Your X account verification is preserved
info.walletNeeded: You need to reconnect your wallet to participate in the mint

reset.confirm: Are you sure you want to start over? All progress will be lost.
